transcript_summary.result_text:
All done. Let me give my honest assessment.

## Result: L4→L5 is a genuine wall — now with a *spawn-independent* impossibility proof

I treated the 7 prior "wall" verdicts as untrusted and re-derived everything independently with the EWM toolkit, including the multi-perception lenses the task flagged. Every distinct hypothesis was tested **on the real env**, not just reasoned:

| # | Hypothesis | Test | Result |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Win = cover BB(11) | Inspected all 4 prior level-ups | ✅ Confirmed; L5's only field-BB is (50,10) |
| 2 | Movement model wrong (gravity/slide/click-move) | Empirical move map + no-op drift | Walk-only ±2; **none** of those exist |
| 3 | Hidden/incomplete toggles | Re-derived panel from scratch | Exactly 6 toggles + 4 8-march controls; the 3 "no-ops" are the 8-march **reverses** |
| 4 | 8-march bridges the island | Maximal march (both axes) | Reaches col 21; seal at cols 22-29 never filled |
| 5 | Portals reachable | Union BFS w/ teleport edges | Circular lock — 4 disconnected components |
| 6 | BB movable | All toggles | BB fixed at (50,10) |
| 7 | **BB vault openable (any spawn)** | 105 toggle phases | **rows 46-49 never walkable → BB uncoverable by ANY means** |
| 8 | Path-dependence | 9 distinct L4 exits + residual toggle states | Byte-identical L5 board + spawn every time |
| 9 | Key-box collection on island | Walk all cells, both 9flip phases | No conversion, **no new diamond unlocked** |
| 10 | Procedural/config win | Real-env board-state BFS | **403 distinct states → 0 wins** |
| 11 | Planner finds a path | `plan_in_model` depth-40 | 0 level-ups |

**The decisive new finding (beyond all prior sessions):** BB(50,10) sits in a 63-cell sealed "vault" (rows 50-54); its only possible entrance from above (rows 46-49) is **never walkable in any of 105 toggle configurations**. So BB cannot be covered regardless of where the player starts or how L4 was completed — this is a *constructive, spawn- and path-independent* impossibility, not
